About Me

Orhan YAZAR

I am an AI Lead Researcher and Senior Data Scientist (PhD in Machine Learning) with a strong background in mathematics. I design and deliver end-to-end AI solutions from research and proof of concept to production, including Generative AI, RAG architectures, and machine learning systems. I also lead cross-functional collaboration with business, engineering, and cloud partners to turn data opportunities into measurable impact.

My Career

AI Lead Researcher

Collaboration with Finnish R&I and leadership of communication with AWS to support strategic AI initiatives. Led multiple AI research projects including distance measurement, web scraping, inpainting on technical drawings, and an MCP-powered RAG architecture for database querying with LLMs.

Main field of study:

AI Research, Generative AI, MCP Frameworks, RAG Architectures, Technical Leadership

May. 2025
Konecranes - Lyon

Senior Data Scientist | PhD

Led a project with two team members, delivered a successful PoC with an estimated impact above 15 million, and drove the project to production.

Main field of study:

Project Leadership, Machine Learning, Data Science, Generative AI

Sep. 2023
Konecranes - Lyon

PhD, Senior data scientist

I joined Konecranes as Data Scientist in order to work on Machine Learning and Gen AI related projects

Main field of study:

Data Science, Machine Learning, Data Visualization, Generative AI

Novencia - Lyon

PhD - Machine Learning/Deep Learning

At Panzani, i developped a tool to analyse promotional operations and to make predictions over incoming promotion's ROI and i participated to the installation of a Big Data structure (Azure infra; ADF, Blob)

Main field of study:

Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Multi Task regression with group of correlated variables
